name: Cheddar Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dry ingredients in a bowl.
2. Cut the butter into the dry mixture until it resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Add the cheddar, onion, and pimento, mixing well.
4. Gradually add the milk, mixing until just moistened.
5. Spread the dough evenly in a 9-inch square baking pan.
6. Bake at 450 degrees F. for 25 to 30 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Cool slightly and cut into squares.
8. Serve warm.
